title: Packing iCE40 $alu+$mux cells into one LUT4

features.name: SB_LUT4 instantiation with unused input tied to constant zero
features.description: Code should include an SB_LUT4 primitive instantiation where one LUT input (I0) is tied to 1'b0, leaving that LUT row unused when it could implement a logic function

features.name: ALU cell output feeding multiplexer input
features.description: Code should include a $alu cell output feeding into a $mux cell select input, representing an arithmetic-logic unit followed by a multiplexer that could be packed into a LUT4

features.name: LUT4 with three active inputs and constant low on fourth
features.description: Code should include a 4-input LUT primitive where one input is permanently tied low and the other three inputs carry actual logic signals, representing an underutilized LUT configuration
